description_for_human: A statically typed, purely functional programming language designed for LLMs to write. Mandatory contracts, algebraic effects, typed slot references, compilation to WebAssembly.
description_for_model: Vera is a programming language designed for large language models to write. It uses typed slot references (@T.n) instead of variable names, requires contracts (requires, ensures, effects) on every function, and compiles to WebAssembly. See /llms.txt for documentation index and /llms-full.txt for complete documentation.
